fixesApplied.description: Mobile accordion title font size was 18px (text-lg), changed to text-header-3 (32px)

fixesApplied.description: Desktop content panel was missing the active tab's title heading. Added desktop-only h3 inside content div.

fixesApplied.description: Mobile +/- icon was 16px (w-4 h-4), changed to 20px (w-5 h-5). Summary alignment changed from items-center to items-start.
fixesApplied.changes: Icon container: w-4 h-4 -> w-5 h-5. Icon bars: w-4 -> w-5. Summary: items-center -> items-start.

fixesApplied.description: Mobile summary padding was py-4 px-6, changed to p-6 for uniform padding.
Removed dead $panelId variable that was assigned but never used.

warnings: Pre-existing CSS token warnings for gap utility
Pre-existing bundle size warnings for editor.js and screen entrypoints

syncStatus.details: All changes applied symmetrically to both TabsItem.php and TabsItem.tsx. Summary classes, icon dimensions, heading element, and content structure all match between PHP and TSX.
